name: IndianOil Easy Axis Bank Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under IndianOil Easy Axis Bank Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: Nil joining fee and nil annual fee as listed on the Axis Bank credit card catalogue
Secured credit card offered through Axis Bank fixed deposit journey
Up to 1,250 EDGE REWARD Points on first fuel transaction
4% value back on fuel spends at IndianOil outlets
Fuel-related benefits are expected to follow IndianOil Axis Bank programme terms unless separately specified by Axis

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria and fixed deposit secured card terms
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria and fixed deposit secured card terms
